name: dashboard-panel
title: Dashboard List Panel
description: Slide-in left dashboard-list panel for the Dashboard module shell, shown in its open state. Composes a segmented Dashboard / NOC tab control, an add-widget circle button, a search field and a scrollable two-level dashboard tree (category node with count -> dashboard leaf with lock icon and favourite star). Tabs, category rows, leaves and stars are real controls with hover, focus-visible and disabled states; selection, expand/collapse and favourite toggling are driven by ARIA attributes.
